name: Ashforge Citadel
seasonal_change: Midyear renewal observances and cooling periods sharply alter labor, ceremony, and transit.
seasonal_effects: Midyear renewal observances and cooling periods sharply alter labor, ceremony, and transit.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
